data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for pre-filling from previous submissions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pre-filling from previous submissions in the intake form. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for pre-filling but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that this feature has been tested or is functioning as required.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of pre-fill functionality from previous submissions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pre-fill functionality.
